title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BISLIG CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 SAN ISIDRO ANNEX IN BARANGAY SAN ISIDRO, CITY OF BISLIG, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE BISLIG CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SAN ISIDRO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
108 OG No. 52, 6529 (December 24, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10236, October 29, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE BISLIG CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 SAN ISIDRO ANNEX IN BARANGAY SAN ISIDRO, CITY OF BISLIG, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE BISLIG CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SAN ISIDRO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into an Independent National High School.

芒聙聯 The Bislig City National High School 芒聙聯 San Isidro Annex in Barangay San Isidro, City of Bislig, Province of Surigao del Sur is hereby separated from the Bislig City National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as San Isidro National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聯 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Bislig City National High School 芒聙聯 San Isidro Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the San Isidro National High School.

SEC. 3. Appropriations. 芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the operationalization of the San Isidro National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriation of the Bislig City National High School 芒聙聯 San Isidro Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聯 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

OCT 29 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
